h2.span: Overall issues and pull requests status

section.div: WebGPU-only, ECS-native 3D runtime where simulation is authoritative and rendering is a derived view.
🔒 Lock scrollbars recursively to prevent scrolling the page.
Starter templates for Even Realities G2 smart glasses apps. Four fully working scaffolds — minimal, asr, image, text-heavy. Clone with degit or git clone.
Refine text anywhere on macOS Highlight text in any app, press Cmd+Shift+R, then rewrite, fix, translate, or transform it with your own modes.

footer.span: These metrics do not include all private contributions
